18.gl: (concretely) a boy (as active), from the age of infancy to adolescence; by implication, a servant; also (by interch. of sex), a girl (of similar latitude in age)
18.kj: babe, boy, child, damsel (from the margin), lad, servant, young (man).

18.gl: to fondle; by implication, to love, especially to compassionate
18.kj: have compassion (on, upon), love, (find, have, obtain, shew) mercy(-iful, on, upon), (have) pity, Ruhamah, [idiom] surely.

18.gl: a bow, forshooting (hence, figuratively, strength) or the iris
18.dv: from H7185 (קָשָׁה) in the original sense (of H6983 (קוֹשׁ)) of bending;

18.gl: the belly, especially the womb; also the bosom or body of anything
18.kj: belly, body, [phrase] as they be born, [phrase] within, womb.
18.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be hollow;

19.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

19.gl: ornament (abstractly or concretely, literally or figuratively)
19.kj: beauty(-iful), bravery, comely, fair, glory(-ious), honour, majesty.

19.gl: splendor (as conspicuous); also a gazelle (as beautiful)
19.dv: from H6638 (צָבָה) in the sense of prominence;

20.kj: alway(-s), constantly, end, ([phrase] n-) ever(more), perpetual, strength, victory.

20.gl: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)
20.kj: abide, continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-er), have habitation, inhabit, lay, place, (cause to) remain, rest, set (up).
